title: Security Scenarios
drDigitalIntro:
Time for realistic security scenarios.
• Spot phishing emails and suspicious websites.
• Decide whether to click links, and handle scam texts.
• Make safe shopping choices. Pass this and you're ready to browse safely.
drDigitalSuccess: You're a security expert! Stay safe out there.
drDigitalHint: When in doubt, don't click. Ask for help if something feels wrong.
